mapper.update: /* TM_ME31001_Dao_saveElyrsEltengMsrinsList */ MERGE INTO tm_me31001 A USING ( SELECT #{ecsElcpwstnDivCd} AS ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, #{mrnrNm} AS mrnr_nm, #{eqpCpcty} AS eqp_cpcty, #{eqpDivInfo} AS eqp_div_info, #{mnfctrYm} AS mnfctr_ym, #{erorExamHistYm} AS eror_exam_hist_ym, #{erorExamPlanYm} AS eror_exam_plan_ym, #{nationAthrzHistYm} AS nation_athrz_hist_ym, #{nationAthrzPlanYm} AS nation_athrz_plan_ym, #{cdmExamCyclePd} AS cdm_exam_cycle_pd, #{cdmGrpId} AS cdm_grp_id, #{rmCtnt} AS rm_ctnt, #{frstRgstrId} AS frst_rgstr_id, #{lastUpdusrId} AS last_updusr_id, #{updtRsn} AS updt_rsn FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd = B.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd AND A.mrnr_nm = B.mrnr_nm ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.eqp_cpcty = B.eqp_cpcty, A.eqp_div_info = B.eqp_div_info, A.mnfctr_ym = B.mnfctr_ym, A.eror_exam_hist_ym = B.eror_exam_hist_ym, A.eror_exam_plan_ym = B.eror_exam_plan_ym, A.nation_athrz_hist_ym = B.nation_athrz_hist_ym, A.nation_athrz_plan_ym = B.nation_athrz_plan_ym, A.cdm_exam_cycle_pd = B.cdm_exam_cycle_pd, A.cdm_grp_id = B.cdm_grp_id, A.rm_ctnt = B.rm_ctnt, A.last_updt_dt = SYSDATE, A.last_updusr_id = B.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn = B.updt_rsn WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( A.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, A.mrnr_nm, A.eqp_cpcty, A.eqp_div_info, A.mnfctr_ym, A.eror_exam_hist_ym, A.eror_exam_plan_ym, A.nation_athrz_hist_ym, A.nation_athrz_plan_ym, A.cdm_exam_cycle_pd, A.cdm_grp_id, A.rm_ctnt, A.frst_regist_dt, A.frst_rgstr_id, A.last_updt_dt, A.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn ) VALUES ( B.ecs_elcpwstn_div_cd, B.mrnr_nm, B.eqp_cpcty, B.eqp_div_info, B.mnfctr_ym, B.eror_exam_hist_ym, B.eror_exam_plan_ym, B.nation_athrz_hist_ym, B.nation_athrz_plan_ym, B.cdm_exam_cycle_pd, B.cdm_grp_id, B.rm_ctnt, SYSDATE, B.frst_rgstr_id, SYSDATE, B.last_updusr_id, B.updt_rsn )
